title: Creamy Blue Cheese Chicken

seo.title: Creamy Blue Cheese Chicken - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 6 chicken fillets (skinless and boneless)
  • 375ml cake flour
  • 4 eggs, lightly beaten
  • 200 g bought dried breadcrumbs
  • 250 ml fresh cream
  • 1 x 100 g blue cheese, broken into small pieces

Method

Set out three plates in a row: one with flour, the next with egg and the last one with the breadcrumbs.

Press the chicken first into the flour, then into the egg and then into the breadcrumbs. Pack the fillets in a single layer into an ovenproof dish where they fit snugly. Pour the cream over and sprinkle the cheese on top.

Cover the dish with foil and bake at 190 ºC for 20 minutes. Remove the foil and bake the chicken for a further 15 minutes or so, or until the chicken is cooked through.

Serves 4 with a big, fresh salad.

Easy!
